creator: reezer@reezer.org
text:
I agree. While I saw that the hashes were different I wasn't sure why. I mostly sticked to the ones from the vendor JSON, but after realizing that some of them are actually newer I updated especially the x/sys bits in the hopes that newer OS versions are better supported.

However, I agree that unless it is known that's really necessary we should stick to what vendor.json says and even then we should poke the project, submitting a pull request or so.
